zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏弱
zh.content:
当前BTC/USD价格在66229.29附近，较20日均线67173仍有一定下行空间，显示短期多头动能不足。价格日内波动区间为65618.51至67020.44，表明市场承压于高点附近，多空力量暂时均衡。短期趋势偏向震荡整理，需关注关键均线的支撑与阻力反应。  

MACD显示当前为-226.66765，空头动能占优，但缺少信号线确认，提示下行压力存在但可能延续震荡。RSI数据缺失，但结合价格与均线位置，可判断市场处于相对弱势，买方力量未能有效推动价格突破高位，技术面短期偏空。  

关键支撑位在65618附近，如跌破可能进一步测试65000整数关口。阻力位接近67020及20日均线67173，若价格突破则可能重启反弹行情。短期交易者应密切关注支撑与阻力反应，避免追高或盲目加仓。  

操作上，建议短线交易以区间震荡策略为主，可在支撑附近考虑低位做多，设置止损以控制风险；高位或阻力区域谨慎减仓或观望，等待明确趋势信号确认后再布局中线头寸，保持仓位灵活。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is currently trading around 66,229 after a modest 24-hour decline of roughly 1.16%, suggesting short-term consolidation following recent upward momentum. Price action sits below the 20-day simple moving average near 67,173, indicating mild near-term bearish pressure. The inability to reclaim this moving average signals weakening bullish momentum in the short term, although the broader structure still resembles a consolidation phase rather than a confirmed trend reversal.

The MACD value is negative at approximately -226, reflecting fading momentum and the possibility of continued short-term downside pressure. While the signal line value is unavailable, the negative reading itself implies that recent price movement has shifted into a bearish momentum phase. The absence of RSI data limits overbought or oversold evaluation, but current positioning below the short-term moving average reinforces the idea that sellers have temporary control.

Key support appears near the recent session low around 65,600. If this level fails, the next technical demand zone may emerge around 64,500–64,000, where prior consolidation occurred. On the upside, resistance sits near the SMA(20) at roughly 67,100, followed by stronger resistance around the recent high near 67,000–67,200. A decisive breakout above this area could revive bullish sentiment and open the path toward the 68,500–69,000 region.

From a trading perspective, short-term traders may consider cautious range strategies while the price remains between 65,600 and 67,200. Bullish positions become more attractive only if Bitcoin reclaims and holds above the 20-day SMA with strong volume. Conversely, a breakdown below 65,600 could trigger momentum-driven selling. Risk management remains critical, as current signals suggest consolidation with a slight bearish bias rather than a clear directional breakout.
